summary: Abuja-based SAP/ERP specialist consultancy with over a decade of implementation experience in high-value verticals.
offering: SAP ERP implementation and functional support (Treasury, Logistics, SRM, Business Intelligence, e-Payment modules), IT infrastructure management, business process optimization, project management, and digital marketing services.
positioning: Specialist SAP/ERP implementation partner for manufacturing, oil & gas, public sector, and financial services clients.
strengths: 13+ years in business/IT consulting with 11+ years of focused SAP ERP implementation experience
Deep SAP module expertise (Treasury, Logistics, SRM, BI, e-Payment) that generalist integrators may lack
Sector focus in high-value verticals (oil & gas, financial services, manufacturing)
gaps_or_weaknesses: Narrow SAP/ERP focus versus broader digital-transformation needs of clients
Less visible digital marketing/brand presence than Microsoft-ecosystem specialists like Cloudsa
perceived_target_customer: Large enterprises in oil & gas, manufacturing, and financial services needing SAP ERP implementation or ongoing functional support.
confidence_notes: Based on company website content; no independently verified client list or case studies were found.
